mnemonics: Proof of Work requires miners to Prove they Worked hard to add a block.
Delegated Proof of Stake: Don't Personally Stake, Delegate someone!
keyPoints: Consensus is the mechanism that allows a decentralized network to agree on a single version of truth.
Proof of Work (PoW) uses computational power to solve complex puzzles and validate transactions.
Proof of Stake (PoS) uses ownership of the native cryptocurrency to validate transactions and create new blocks.
commonMistakes: Assuming blockchain consensus is only about validating transactions (it's also about adding new blocks and securing the network).
Thinking all consensus mechanisms are equally energy-efficient (PoW is energy-intensive, while PoS is not).
